subject: Magical Token
fact: Felkur used a specialized magical token to cast a high-potency sleep spell that bypassed the fire giant Brandyr's natural defenses.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell that bypassed the fire giant Brandyr's natural defenses

subject: Magical Token
fact: Using the magical token left Felkur with four tokens remaining.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Portable Hole
fact: The party used a portable hole equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: A magical extra-dimensional storage space equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus, used by the party to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: The party used two reduction scrolls to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's massive frame down by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories

subject: Runic Key
fact: Vraxen carried a runic key that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key carried by Vraxen that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Runic Key
fact: The runic key was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner.
source_quote: It was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner

subject: Runic Key
fact: The party snatched the runic key using telekinesis.
source_quote: and was snatched by the party using telekinesis

subject: Seeming Scroll
fact: The party held a seeming scroll as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants if their infiltration of the Spire was compromised.
source_quote: A magical scroll held by the party as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants if their infiltration of the Spire was compromised

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass desires The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is believed to contain information that could expose Felkur's true identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster.
source_quote: and is believed to contain information that could expose Felkur's true identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: Felkur originally stole a divination artifact from Mulmaster without knowing what it was.
source_quote: A powerful item originally stolen from Mulmaster by Felkur, who did not know what it was

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: The divination artifact grants perfect divination and protection from scrying.
source_quote: It grants perfect divination and protection from scrying

subject: Divination Artifact activation
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the divination artifact.
source_quote: Felkur accidentally activated it

subject: Divination Artifact sale
fact: Felkur sold the divination artifact for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: and then sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: Mulmaster investigation
fact: The sale of the divination artifact triggered years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy.
source_quote: triggering years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy

subject: Sleep spell cast
fact: Felkur cast a powerful enchantment sleep spell using a magical token that successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: A powerful enchantment cast by Felkur using a magical token that successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr

subject: Sleep spell effect
fact: The sleep spell bypassed Brandyr's physical defenses through a wisdom-based magical assault.
source_quote: bypassing her physical defenses through a wisdom-based magical assault

subject: Reduce spell cast
fact: Bramgrim and Daein cast the transmutation spell Reduce twice to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's size by two categories.
source_quote: A transmutation spell cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein — to shrink the fire giant Brandyr's size by two categories

subject: Reduce spell result
fact: The Reduce spell allowed Brandyr to fit inside the party's portable hole.
source_quote: so she could fit inside the party's portable hole

subject: Reduce spell saving throw
fact: No saving throw was required for the Reduce spell because Brandyr was incapacitated.
source_quote: Because Brandyr was incapacitated, no saving throw was required

subject: Nature's Veil use
fact: Akritas used the ranger ability Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: A ranger ability used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Nature's Veil effect
fact: Akritas used invisibility to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected.
source_quote: allowing her to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected

subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to provide a significant boost to the entire party's stealth.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas to provide a significant boost to the entire party's stealth

subject: Pass Without Trace effect
fact: Pass Without Trace masked the party's movements and sounds as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: masking their movements and sounds as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Minor Illusion first use
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: first by Daein to mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Minor Illusion first effect
fact: Daein's mimicry of Graz'zt deceived the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts.
source_quote: to deceive the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts

subject: Minor Illusion second use
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion later to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris during the dinner.
source_quote: and later to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris during the dinner

subject: Minor Illusion second effect
fact: Daein's mimicry tricked Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd.
source_quote: tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Telekinetic Movement use
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table and into the party's possession.
source_quote: Used by Daein to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table and into the party's possession

subject: Telekinetic Movement timing
fact: Daein pulled the key while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage.
source_quote: while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage
